global.title: Severe storms put tens of millions on alert - NBC News
global.summary: A broad storm system is placing 64 million people from Indiana to New England at risk, with flash flooding rescues in Texas and storm damage already reported in West Virginia.
global.whyItMatters: Severe weather creates immediate pastoral needs: prayer, practical care, and readiness to support anxious or displaced families.

global.title: Iranian missiles aimed for U.S. allies intercepted - NBC News
global.summary: New Iranian missile attacks aimed at U.S. allies were intercepted, signaling fresh strain on an already fragile regional ceasefire.
global.whyItMatters: This keeps Middle East tensions high and invites wise, peace-centered prayer and careful public pastoral framing.

global.title: Emergency 'safe haven' order for Space Station astronauts - NBC News
global.summary: NASA moved five International Space Station crew members into a docked capsule as a worsening leak on the Russian side prompted an emergency safe-haven order.
global.whyItMatters: It is a vivid reminder of human vulnerability, courage, and the need for calm leadership under pressure.

canadian.title: Canada's Ivey PMI rises to eight-month high in May - KITCO
canadian.summary: Reuters reports that Canada's Ivey PMI rose to 58.2 in May, its highest level since September, while the prices index also climbed, pointing to stronger activity and persistent inflation pressure.
canadian.whyItMatters: Economic strength mixed with rising prices affects household stress, generosity, and the practical burdens many church families are carrying.

persecutedChurch.title: Jerusalem's Greek Orthodox Patriarch asks Trump to protect Mideast Christians - Haaretz
persecutedChurch.summary: The Greek Orthodox Patriarch of Jerusalem appealed for protection of Christian communities across Lebanon, Syria, and Israel, warning that ancient believers are under growing pressure and need freedom of worship and safety.
persecutedChurch.whyItMatters: This is a direct window into the pressures facing historic Christian communities and can guide informed intercession for the wider church.

persecutedChurch.title: Utah delegation defends Church of Jesus Christ as ‘Christian’ after new Pentagon classification - AOL.com
persecutedChurch.summary: Utah lawmakers are pushing back after a Pentagon classification change reportedly removed Latter-day Saints from the Christian category and dropped several minority faiths from the recognized list.
persecutedChurch.whyItMatters: Even outside overt persecution, state treatment of religious identity and minority faiths matters for religious liberty and conscience protections.

leadership.title: The New Leadership Skill Nobody Taught In Business School - Forbes
leadership.summary: The piece argues that in a fast-changing environment, leaders need adaptive curiosity: the ability to keep learning, question assumptions, and stay emotionally steady when clear answers are not yet available.
leadership.whyItMatters: For a pastor, this is a timely reminder that faithful leadership today requires humility, teachability, and calm discernment rather than quick certainty.

goodNews.title: The Uplift: Ellie the elephant - CBS News
goodNews.summary: CBS highlights heartwarming stories centered on Big Ellie, the New York Liberty's elephant mascot, offering a light and cheerful moment in the news cycle.
goodNews.whyItMatters: A small dose of joy can help pastors carry hope into weary rooms and remind people that delight is also part of faithful ministry.
